title: Add deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill background music

requirements.text: Replace the existing forge ambient sound system with deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill background music that plays continuously when the user enables audio via the music toggle button in the header

quotes: Music playing should be deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill

acceptanceCriteria: The music has a deep bass character with cyberpunk and Psy chill aesthetic
Music plays continuously on loop when enabled
The existing header audio toggle button (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/button[1]) controls the music playback
Music volume is appropriately balanced for background listening
Audio stops cleanly when toggled off or component unmounts

requirements.text: Update the AmbientSound component to generate or play deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill music instead of the current forge ambient sounds (metal clinks, heat hum, noise)

quotes: Music playing should be deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill

acceptanceCriteria: The component generates synthesized deep bass tones with cyberpunk characteristics
The music has a Psy chill vibe with atmospheric pads and rhythmic elements
The existing volume toggle functionality remains intact
Audio context initialization and cleanup logic is preserved

constraints: Do not modify the header component structure or button placement
Preserve the existing audio toggle control mechanism in the Header component
Maintain Web Audio API usage for sound generation
Keep the volume control and audio context cleanup patterns
nonGoals: Adding external audio file playback or streaming
Modifying other ambient sound effects in the TrophyRoom component
Changing the visual design of the audio toggle button
Adding music visualization or spectrum analyzers
